---
title: "On the Dangers of Stochastic Parrots"
description: "Bender, Gebru, McMillan-Major, Shmitchell. On the Dangers of Stochastic Parrots."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-01-24"
categories: [NLP, NLG, NLU, ethics, paper, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Stochastic Parrots paper. Image from [University of Washington](http://faculty.washington.edu/ebender/papers/Stochastic_Parrots.pdf).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Emily M. Bender, Timnit Gebru, Angelina McMillan-Major, Shmargaret Shmitchell. 2021.

On the Dangers of Stochastic Parrots: Can Language Models Be Too Big? <http://faculty.washington.edu/ebender/papers/Stochastic_Parrots.pdf>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_nlg-nlp-nlu-activity-6759201412816752640-5BHi).*
